SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-07-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-07-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF CARLO AMODEO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NEURO42, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-07-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMODEO, CARLO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEURO42, INC. $978.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,093.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT NEURO42, INC.
